---
title: "My AI Assistant"
listing:
  contents: vignettes
  type: table
  sort: "title asc"
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

A personal reference repository for AI assistant workflows, prompt 
templates, and helper functions for working with the Claude and 
OpenAI APIs in R and Python.

See the vignettes below for guidelines, SOPs, and worked examples.
